---
title: Openair - data analysis tools for the air quality community
date: '2012-01-01'
author:
- K. Ropkins
- D.C. Carslaw
categories:
- Journal Article
publication: '*R Journal*'
---

## Openair - data analysis tools for the air quality community

<p class="pub-meta">K. Ropkins, D.C. Carslaw</p>

_*R Journal*_, 2012


<div class="pub-links">
<a href="carslaw-2012-c.bib" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm"><i class="bi bi-download"></i> BibTeX</a>
</div>
